refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control actions effectiveness, and optimization algorithm performance against the target energy_per_ton ≤ E_target.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with data acquisition system.
DP2: Implement vehicle control algorithms for energy-efficient operation.
DP3: Develop optimization software module for operational parameter tuning.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with data acquisition system.

coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically independent and interfaces cleanly with control and optimization DPs via data outputs.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data is available and reliable.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy measurement accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider redundancy in sensor systems to mitigate measurement risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including energy and load sensors and onboard data acquisition hardware.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Transmit energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution for further processing.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Bidirectional communication for sensor data and control commands.

module_containment_scores.notes: Sensors and data acquisition are physically contained within Vehicle; minimal diffusion.
Receives data but does not contain sensor hardware.
No direct containment; only receives processed data.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement hardware and initial data acquisition are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and latency.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in upgrading sensor hardware due to physical integration.
Risk of data loss if Vehicle communication interfaces fail.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modular sensor packages to ease upgrades and ensure robust communication protocols.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor integration) directly satisfies the measurement sub-FR with clear verification methods.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as sensors are physically contained within Vehicle.
Communication interfaces are well-defined and limited.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Vehicle aligns with physical hardware boundaries, supporting maintainability.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor calibration and telemetry data validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement function to Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add redundancy and fault detection in sensor systems.
Define protocols for sensor data integrity over Network Link.

decision.justification: While the measurement FR and DP are well defined and assigned, the overall FR requires further decomposition to cover control and optimization aspects for full energy efficiency support.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: To decompose the high-level energy efficiency FR into atomic sub-FRs enabling complete coverage of measurement, control, and optimization.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and timely.
Vehicle module can support additional control and optimization interfaces.
open_risks: Sensor failure impact on energy efficiency monitoring.
Integration complexity with control and optimization modules.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and reliability test results.
Interface performance metrics between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
